rationale: Educ. Code §11.184 governs efficiency audit procedures before school district M&O tax rate elections. Increasing the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter these procedural audit requirements or conflict with any operative provision.
quote: the board of trustees of a school district shall conduct an efficiency audit before seeking voter approval to adopt a tax rate for the maintenance and operations of the district
_note: No direct statutory conflict. The proposed change affects exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b), not the efficiency audit process under Educ. Code §11.184.
